case_title: BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO VS DWYER, SEAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,684.00 FILED BY BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT DWYER, SEAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DWYER, SEAN THE CONTRACT WAS FULLY PERFORMED. ALL TERMS AND CONDITIONS WERE MET STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-29-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07 TRIAL OF OCT-26-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DWYER, SEAN
